title: DataComp-VLM: Improved Open Datasets for Vision-Language Models
innovation_summary: DataComp-VLM: Improved Open Datasets for Vision-Language Models: We introduce DataComp for VLMs (DCVLM), a benchmark for controlled data-centric experiments to improve VLM training.
